case_title: GLORIA ELENA ORTEGA ET AL VS. ROSSI LUIS MARIO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT MARIO, ROSSI LUIS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-21-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-10-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORTEGA, GLORIA ELENA RONDA, CLAUDIO M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MARIO, ROSSI LUIS ALTHOUGH PLAINTIFFS ARE DISATISFIED WITH THE APPEARANCE OF THEIR REUPHOLSTERED CUSHIONS, THE EVIDENCE DID NOT SUPPORT THEIR CONCLUSION THAT DEFENDANT FELL BELOW PROFESSIONAL STANDARDS WHEN DEFENDANT REUPHOLSTERED PLAINTIFF'S ANTIQUE SOFA AND LOVESEAT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER SC-152 ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS APPROVED. COURT ORDERS THE TRIAL POSTPONED TO 11/10/16 AT 3:30 P.M. IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-02-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARIO, ROSSI LUIS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,973.79 FILED BY ORTEGA, GLORIA ELENA RONDA, CLAUDIO M. AS TO DEFENDANT MARIO, ROSSI LUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-10-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-10-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS GLORIA ELENA ORTEGA & CLAUDIO M. RONDA, AND DEFENDANT ROSSI LUIS MARIO. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER ASSISTED PLAINTIFF GLORIA ELENA ORTEGA AT TODAY'S HEARING. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-10-2016 - JUDGMENT.
